title: Promises, Async Functions, and the Event Loop · Behavior Brief: Async Await
summary: Coordinate status requests, deadlines, retries, and user cancellation without races or unhandled failures. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js async await increment in a bounded asynchronous status coordinator. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use async and await as promise control flow without serializing independent work accidentally.
Create, return, chain, and observe promises while preserving values and rejection paths.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
